description: Configure the prepress terminal's Chrome browser for handling heavy graphics files securely based on the specification document at ~/Desktop/prepress_terminal_spec.txt. Ensure PDFs are forced to download rather than opening natively. Set the download directory to ~/Documents/Prepress_Spool and enable the option to ask where to save each file. Enable the GPU acceleration flags 'enable-gpu-rasterization' and 'ignore-gpu-blocklist' for 3D web proofing. Configure a custom site search engine with the keyword 'color' pointing to 'https://www.pantone.com/color-finder?q=%s'. Organize professional bookmarks on the bookmark bar into four folders: 'Web-to-Print MIS', 'Color Management', 'Asset Libraries', and 'Equipment Support'. Remove all personal and entertainment bookmarks from the browser.
